data.title: Small navel oranges boost economy in Guangxi, serving as hope for farmers in an ethnic county; significant lever for Fuchuan Yao. (Total characters: 108)
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in the Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region of south China, small oranges in navel orange bases symbolize hope and prosperity for fruit farmers in an ethnic county. These bases have served as a key economic driver for Fuchuan Yao, providing a source of livelihood and sustenance for many years.
Russian air defenses shoot down drone near Moscow, mayor reports.

data.title: FDA approves Agios’ AQVESME™ (mitapivat) for anemia in adults with thalassemia. It's an oral PK activator.
data.description: Agios revealed that AQVESME™ (mitapivat), an oral pyruvate kinase (PK) activator, has received approval from the U.S. FDA for the treatment of thalassemia.

data.title: Nona Biosciences expands discovery-to-clinical capabilities, enhancing framework for early clinical development.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Nona Biosciences, a leading biotechnology firm based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed an expansion of its advanced technology platforms for biotherapeutic discovery to aid early clinical development. The company's integrated framework aims to accelerate the advancement of new treatments and enhance their overall development process.
China’s central bank sets yuan midpoint higher at 7.0471 per USD, compared with last close of 7.0280.

data.title: China's auto sector hits 'three 30-million' milestone, showcasing economic potential. Video by Yishijie explains People's Daily article. Confidence in long-term development.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, a video was published by studio Yishijie providing insights into a recent article from People's Daily. The video emphasized that China's economy is not only significant in size but also in potential, showcasing optimism for its future growth. The video expressed confidence in the long-term development of China's economy, highlighting its robust nature.
Petronas expands LNG collaboration with CNOOC with fresh supply agreement.
Asia markets trade mixed in thin Christmas Eve trading-cnbc

data.title: Commerce Group donates $25,000 in toys to CHiPs for Kids Toy Drive by California Highway Patrol to help children in need.
data.description: In a generous gesture, The Commerce Group contributed $25,000 worth of toys to support underprivileged children via the CHiPs for Kids Toy Drive in Los Angeles. Annually, the California Highway Patrol organizes a toy collection initiative across the state, gathering new, unwrapped toys for those in need. This year's drive continues the tradition of providing joy to countless children...

data.title: Ascendant Holidays at Vista Cay Resort in Orlando, Florida, awarded RCI® Gold Crown for 3rd year in a row for excellence in guest satisfaction and hospitality.
data.description: The esteemed recognition underscores the unfailing commitment to guest contentment, top-notch hospitality norms, and superior resort standards in Orlando, Florida. In a recent development on December 23, 2025, Ascendant Holidays joyfully declares that Ascendant Holidays at Vista Cay Resort has clinched the prestigious designation.
Taiwan’s overnight interbank rate begins session at 0.805%, flat from prior open.
